notes: The four historical case corpora are frozen as the v1 working corpus: rights-reviewed, acquired, normalized, segmented, verified, and JSON-valid. MIPVU lexical-unit worklists are generated for every v1 document. Lincoln now has a complete Codex-assisted first-pass MIPVU review and reliability gate; American Revolution and Napoleon worklists are committed and await review; Hitler worklists are generated locally but gitignored because they tokenize local fair-use German source text. Wholesale redownload, starter-corpus replacement, and source expansion are out of scope for the annotation-forward reprocess unless a specific source defect is found. Remaining v1 work includes source-language MIPVU review for comparator cases, human review of Lincoln's Codex-assisted decisions before publication-grade reliability claims, CMT/Koenigsbergian annotation generation, comparator case support ratings, and promotion of public findings.
